title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
author: Yulie Kwon Kim VP Product Google Workspace
raw_description: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
summary: Google Workspace 推出新功能，包括 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 的语音能力、新设计工具 Google Pics 以及 AI Inbox 更新，提升用户效率。
analysis_note: 产品更新，AI 集成度一般，技术深度不足，偏向商业化应用。
